# ­čöŹ CBT Audit Report ÔÇö Standalone HMG CBT vs. School Connect

**Question asked:** Does the CBT system generated by School Connect have all the
features of the HMG Academy Standalone CBT System
(https://cbtsystem-hmgacademy.vercel.app/ ┬Ě https://github.com/hmgacademyhub/cbt-system)?
If not, implement them, and make CBT results pull into the report card.

**Finding (before v2):** ÔŁî **No.** The generated "CBT" was a single placeholder page
(`cbt.html`) produced by the generic module template. It had:
- no exam/question data model (the DB had **no** exam tables),
- no question types, no scoring, no timer, no anti-cheat, no certificates,
- no CSV upload, no codes/links, no student exam-taking flow,
- **no connection to report cards** at all.

**Resolution (Gen v2):** Ôťů A full CBT engine and a flexible, interconnected
report-card system were implemented and verified. See the parity table below.

---

## Gap analysis & implementation

| Capability | Standalone CBT | Before v2 | Gen v2 | Implemented in |
|------------|:--:|:--:|:--:|----------------|
| Exam data model | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `database/cbt-schema.sql` (`cbt_exams`) |
| Results data model | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `cbt_results` |
| 17 question types | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `cbt-engine.js` `CBT.TYPES` |
| Auto + partial scoring | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `CBT.scoreQuestion` |
| Negative marking | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | grading + `negative_mark` |
| CSV upload + template | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `CBT.parseCSV` + sample CSV |
| Access code + link + WhatsApp | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | share modal, `cbt-exam.html?code=` |
| Open / registered modes | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `exam_mode`, `cbt_roster` |
| Attempt limit | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | enforced in `cbt_submit` |
| Randomise + subset delivery | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `CBT.shuffle` + `select_count` |
| Timer + navigator + flags | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | student page |
| Draft auto-save | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `localStorage` |
| Held vs instant results | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `release_results` |
| Certificate / submission code | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `cbt_submit` cert code |
| Emergency JSON backup | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | student fallback |
| Anti-cheat suite | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `CBT.startAntiCheat` + config |
| Teacher results + CSV export | Ôťů | ÔŁî | Ôťů | CBT teacher page |
| Answers hidden from students | Ôťů (partial) | ÔŁî | Ôťů (hardened) | `cbt_get_public_exam` RPC strips answers |
| **Results Ôćĺ report card** | ÔŁî | ÔŁî | Ôťů **new** | `cbt_push_to_reportcard` |
| **Flexible report columns + marks** | ÔŁî | ÔŁî | Ôťů **new** | `assessment_columns`, `report_scores` |
| **Platform analytics** | partial | partial | Ôťů expanded | `analytics.js` + `analytics.html` |
| **Admin read/delete/backup/restore** | partial | ÔŁî | Ôťů | `admin-data.html` |

---

## Security hardening vs. the standalone approach

The standalone system relies on browser-side grading and stores correct answers in the
exam record. Gen v2 keeps instant client feedback **but** adds a server-authoritative
layer:

- `cbt_get_public_exam(code)` ÔÇö a **security-definer** RPC that returns the question
  bank to anonymous students **with the `correct`/`explanation`/`accept` fields removed**.
- `cbt_submit(payload)` ÔÇö a security-definer RPC that records the submission, enforces
  the **attempt limit**, generates the **certificate code**, and reports whether results
  are released.
- Row-Level Security: only **staff/admin** can read full results or manage exams;
  anonymous students interact **only** through the two RPCs.

---

## Verification performed

| Check | Method | Result |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Scoring across all 17 type families | Node unit tests on `cbt-engine.js` | Ôťů correct (MCQ, MRQ AON/partial, numeric tolerance, matching, ordering, essay keywords, negative marking, grading) |
| `cbt-schema.sql` runs standalone & in-order | PostgreSQL 17 | Ôťů exit 0, idempotent |
| `reportcard-schema.sql` runs standalone & in-order | PostgreSQL 17 | Ôťů exit 0, idempotent |
| CBT Ôćĺ report-card mapping with scaling | live SQL simulation | Ôťů 45/50 Ôćĺ 54/60; subject total 62/70 = 88.57% |
| Generated pages' inline JS | `node --check` | Ôťů all valid |
| Bundled SQL == source | diff | Ôťů identical |
| Full 4-file install in a generated ZIP | PostgreSQL 17 | Ôťů all exit 0 |

**Conclusion:** the School-Connect-generated CBT now matches (and in security and
report-card integration, exceeds) the HMG Academy Standalone CBT System, using only
free tools and no AI APIs.
